title: antidesma edule
intro: Antidesma edule, also known as the mango oak or Muntingia tree, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Antidesma edule include its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to address various health issues.
